New York City, USA.name: Times Square LED Spectacular
New York City, USA.description: Picture your brand towering over the most photographed intersection on Earth. Over 360,000 pairs of eyes pass through Times Square every single day — tourists, executives, dreamers, all looking up. This is where global icons launch, and it could be where your business becomes one.

New York City, USA.name: Broadway Pedestrian Plaza Digital Tower
New York City, USA.description: A vertical digital tower right where foot traffic slows to a stroll — perfect dwell time for your message to sink in. This is the spot for brands who want to be remembered, not just seen.

New York City, USA.name: 5th Avenue Retail Corridor Screen
New York City, USA.description: The world's most expensive shopping street, and now a stage for your brand. Shoppers here are already in a spending mindset — give them one more reason to remember your name.

New York City, USA.name: Grand Central Terminal Digital Wall
New York City, USA.description: Over 750,000 commuters pass through this landmark every day. Your brand becomes part of their daily rhythm — seen, trusted, and remembered by the same faces, again and again.

New York City, USA.name: Brooklyn Bridge Approach Digital Board
New York City, USA.description: Catch drivers and cyclists at a natural slow-point as they approach one of the world's most iconic bridges. High dwell time, unforgettable backdrop.

New York City, USA.name: Herald Square Digital Screen
New York City, USA.description: Right by Macy's flagship store, this spot mixes shoppers, commuters, and tourists into one dense, high-value audience pool.

New York City, USA.name: Union Square Digital Panel
New York City, USA.description: A cultural crossroads of downtown Manhattan — students, professionals, and creatives all pass through here daily, making it ideal for youth-forward and lifestyle brands.

New York City, USA.name: JFK Airport Arrivals Digital Tower
New York City, USA.description: Greet international travelers the second they land in New York. A captive, high-income audience with nowhere else to look.

London, UK.name: Piccadilly Lights Curved Screen
London, UK.description: The Piccadilly Lights have welcomed the world's biggest brands since 1908. Your ad here sits beside advertising royalty, watched by 100 million+ impressions a year in the heart of London's West End.

London, UK.name: Oxford Street Digital Panel
London, UK.description: Europe's busiest shopping street, right outside the doors of the stores your customers already love. Put your brand exactly where the buying decisions happen.

London, UK.name: Waterloo Station Digital Concourse
London, UK.description: London's busiest railway station, full of commuters with a few precious seconds of attention to spare — make those seconds count.

London, UK.name: Shoreditch High Street Urban Panel
London, UK.description: London's creative heartland, full of trend-setters and early adopters. If you want your brand to feel culturally relevant, this is where that reputation starts.

London, UK.name: Canary Wharf Business District Screen
London, UK.description: London's financial powerhouse, filled with decision-makers who control real budgets. A premium spot for brands that mean business.

London, UK.name: King's Cross St. Pancras Digital Wall
London, UK.description: A gateway station linking London to Europe via Eurostar. International and domestic travelers alike pass this spot daily.

London, UK.name: Camden Market Urban Screen
London, UK.description: Quirky, youthful, and endlessly photographed — Camden draws a young, engaged crowd that loves discovering new brands.

London, UK.name: Heathrow Airport Terminal 5 Digital Panel
London, UK.description: One of the world's busiest airports. Reach a premium, international, high-spending audience the moment they land or depart.

Dubai, UAE.name: Sheikh Zayed Road Mega Screen
Dubai, UAE.description: Dubai's main artery, lined with luxury and ambition. Your brand joins the skyline that never sleeps, seen by commuters, tourists, and the region's most affluent audience every single day.

Dubai, UAE.name: Dubai Mall Entrance Panel
Dubai, UAE.description: Placed at the entrance of the world's most-visited shopping destination, this spot puts your brand in front of high-intent shoppers the moment they're ready to spend.

Dubai, UAE.name: Downtown Dubai / Burj Khalifa Boulevard Screen
Dubai, UAE.description: Sit beside the tallest building on Earth. Tourists, luxury shoppers, and international business travelers all pass through this district — pure prestige for your brand.

Dubai, UAE.name: Dubai Marina / JBR Lifestyle Screen
Dubai, UAE.description: Where Dubai's lifestyle scene lives — waterfront dining, luxury living, and leisure. Perfect for automotive, property, and premium lifestyle brands.

Dubai, UAE.name: Dubai International Airport (DXB) Digital Tower
Dubai, UAE.description: Greet the world the moment they land. DXB is one of the busiest airports on the planet, delivering a captive, high-income, international audience.

Dubai, UAE.name: Al Ittihad Road Commuter Screen
Dubai, UAE.description: Connecting Dubai and Sharjah, this high-volume corridor delivers exceptional reach for mass-market brands at a fraction of the cost of prime downtown spots.

Dubai, UAE.name: Mall of the Emirates Entrance Screen
Dubai, UAE.description: Home to Ski Dubai and hundreds of retail brands, this mall draws a huge, affluent crowd looking to spend on lifestyle and leisure.

Oslo, Norway.name: Karl Johans Gate Digital Screen
Oslo, Norway.description: Oslo's main boulevard, running straight to the Royal Palace. This is where locals shop, stroll, and gather — a premium address for any brand entering the Norwegian market.

Oslo, Norway.name: Oslo Central Station Digital Panel
Oslo, Norway.description: Norway's busiest transit hub, connecting the whole country. Reach commuters, travelers, and tourists in one high-traffic location.

Oslo, Norway.name: Aker Brygge Waterfront Screen
Oslo, Norway.description: Oslo's trendiest waterfront district, full of restaurants, bars, and a young professional crowd enjoying the harbor views.

Oslo, Norway.name: Oslo Airport Gardermoen Digital Tower
Oslo, Norway.description: Norway's main international gateway. Capture a high-income, well-traveled audience arriving from across the globe.

Oslo, Norway.name: Bygdøy Allé Residential Corridor Screen
Oslo, Norway.description: A leafy, affluent artery connecting central Oslo to the museums of Bygdøy peninsula — ideal for lifestyle and family-oriented brands.

Oslo, Norway.name: Oslo City Shopping Centre Panel
Oslo, Norway.description: One of Oslo's largest shopping centres, right next to the Central Station — shoppers here are ready to spend.

Oslo, Norway.name: Grünerløkka District Urban Screen
Oslo, Norway.description: Oslo's hippest neighbourhood, full of cafés, boutiques, and a young creative crowd — perfect for brands wanting cultural cachet.

Paris, France.name: Champs-Élysées Flagship LED Screen
Paris, France.description: The world's most iconic avenue, home to LVMH, Cartier, and Louis Vuitton flagship stores. Advertise here and your brand joins the pantheon of global luxury.

Paris, France.name: La Défense Business District Spectacular
Paris, France.description: Europe's largest purpose-built business district, home to Total Energies, BNP Paribas, and AXA. Reach decision-makers where they work.

Paris, France.name: Châtelet-Les Halles Metro Digital Wall
Paris, France.description: Europe's busiest underground interchange. A relentless flow of Parisians and visitors passes through here every single day.

Paris, France.name: Avenue Montaigne Luxury Screen
Paris, France.description: The couture heart of Paris, lined with the world's most exclusive fashion houses. A rare, prestigious placement for premium brands.

Paris, France.name: Boulevard Haussmann Digital Panel
Paris, France.description: Home to Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, this is Parisian shopping at its most iconic — perfect for retail and lifestyle brands.

Paris, France.name: Charles de Gaulle Airport (CDG) Digital Tower
Paris, France.description: One of Europe's busiest airports, greeting a huge international audience the moment they touch down in France.

Paris, France.name: Place de la République Urban Panel
Paris, France.description: A lively public square where Parisians gather, protest, celebrate, and pass through daily — always full of energy and attention.

Berlin, Germany.name: Kurfürstendamm Digital Screen
Berlin, Germany.description: Berlin's most famous shopping boulevard, mixing high fashion with everyday culture. A strong address for brands entering the German market.

Berlin, Germany.name: Alexanderplatz Digital Tower
Berlin, Germany.description: A massive transit and shopping hub in the heart of former East Berlin. Huge daily footfall from commuters, shoppers, and tourists alike.

Berlin, Germany.name: Berlin Hauptbahnhof Digital Wall
Berlin, Germany.description: Germany's largest train station and a striking piece of modern architecture. Reach a nationwide travel audience in one spot.

Berlin, Germany.name: Potsdamer Platz Urban Screen
Berlin, Germany.description: A symbol of reunified Berlin, blending business, culture, and nightlife. A magnet for both locals and international visitors.

Berlin, Germany.name: Berlin Brandenburg Airport (BER) Digital Panel
Berlin, Germany.description: Berlin's international gateway. Capture travelers from across Europe and beyond the moment they arrive.

Berlin, Germany.name: Friedrichstraße Shopping Screen
Berlin, Germany.description: A historic boulevard turned modern shopping destination, blending Berlin's past and present with a steady flow of shoppers and professionals.

Berlin, Germany.name: East Side Gallery Tourist Corridor Panel
Berlin, Germany.description: One of Berlin's most visited landmarks — a stretch of the former Wall covered in murals, drawing tourists from around the world.

Madrid, Spain.name: Gran Vía Digital Screen
Madrid, Spain.description: Madrid's grand shopping and theatre avenue, often called the "Spanish Broadway." Constant foot traffic from shoppers, tourists, and theatre-goers.

Madrid, Spain.name: Puerta del Sol Digital Tower
Madrid, Spain.description: The literal center of Madrid — all roads in Spain are measured from this square. Maximum visibility in the city's most symbolic location.

Madrid, Spain.name: Plaza de Cibeles Urban Panel
Madrid, Spain.description: One of Madrid's most photographed landmarks, surrounded by grand architecture and steady traffic of both cars and pedestrians.

Madrid, Spain.name: Madrid-Barajas Airport Digital Wall
Madrid, Spain.description: Spain's busiest airport and a major hub for Latin America. Reach an international, high-spending travel audience.

Madrid, Spain.name: Salamanca District Luxury Screen
Madrid, Spain.description: Madrid's most exclusive shopping district, home to designer boutiques and the city's wealthiest residents.

Madrid, Spain.name: Atocha Station Digital Panel
Madrid, Spain.description: Madrid's largest railway station, connecting the capital to the rest of Spain via high-speed rail. Constant commuter and traveler flow.

Madrid, Spain.name: Plaza Mayor Urban Screen
Madrid, Spain.description: A historic square in the heart of old Madrid, packed daily with tourists, street performers, and locals alike.

Monaco.name: Casino Square Digital Screen
Monaco.description: The glamorous heart of Monaco, home to the Monte Carlo Casino. Your brand shares the spotlight with the world's wealthiest visitors and residents.

Monaco.name: Port Hercule Marina Screen
Monaco.description: Overlooking superyachts and the Mediterranean, this is pure luxury real estate for your brand — ideal during the Grand Prix and Yacht Show.

Monaco.name: Avenue des Spélugues Digital Panel
Monaco.description: A short walk from the Casino and Monte Carlo's grand hotels, this spot puts your brand in front of the principality's most affluent foot traffic.

Moscow, Russia.name: Tverskaya Street Digital Screen
Moscow, Russia.description: Moscow's main shopping and business street, running straight to Red Square. Constant crowds of shoppers, workers, and tourists.

Moscow, Russia.name: Red Square Vicinity Digital Panel
Moscow, Russia.description: Steps from one of the most recognizable landmarks on Earth, this spot delivers unmatched symbolic weight for any brand entering Russia.

Moscow, Russia.name: Moscow City (Business Center) Screen
Moscow, Russia.description: Moscow's futuristic skyscraper district and financial hub. Reach a concentrated audience of executives and professionals daily.

Moscow, Russia.name: Sheremetyevo Airport Digital Tower
Moscow, Russia.description: Russia's busiest airport, connecting Moscow to the world. A strong placement for brands targeting international arrivals.

Moscow, Russia.name: Arbat Street Pedestrian Screen
Moscow, Russia.description: A historic pedestrian street beloved by locals and tourists, filled with street art, cafés, and steady foot traffic.

Moscow, Russia.name: Kievskaya Metro Interchange Panel
Moscow, Russia.description: One of Moscow's busiest metro interchanges, delivering a huge daily flow of commuters across multiple lines.

Moscow, Russia.name: Novy Arbat Digital Screen
Moscow, Russia.description: A wide modern avenue known for nightlife and shopping, drawing a steady evening crowd of locals and visitors.
